name: p27_b_line_deep_prefix_gpu_telemetry_suite
purpose: Bounded same-stream GPU telemetry for the p27 B-line deep-prefix descent. This is a structural data run, not a production certificate hunt.
entry_condition: Run only as bounded telemetry if the native GPU path can emit Bplus plus selected gate bits d3..dN from the same p27 candidate stream, or if the quartic/CAS work needs larger same-stream B-line data.
non_goal: Do not use this as a large p27 production run or as B-bucket scoring. Constant-factor B buckets are already priced and are not sqrt-beating.

emit_for_each_non_degenerate_row: candidate stream identifier: seed/chunk/thread/lane or equivalent replay key
Bplus value or stable hash plus enough data to reconstruct Bplus
selected gate bits d3,d4,...,dN along the all-plus continuation path
preferred_depths: d3..d12 minimum, matching the CPU deep-descent frontier
record the implemented maximum depth even if fewer than d12 are feasible
telemetry_contract.same_stream_requirement: All counts must use the same source stream and the same denominator as baseline so target/source_draw is meaningful.

latest_cpu_baseline.interpretation: Bplus controls the selected bits, but source-normalized all-plus prefixes stay near independent half-loss through meaningful counts d3..d12. A GPU run must beat this baseline or feed Kummer-class extraction.

bounded_run_tiers.target_rows: at least 100000 legal d2 rows or the closest cheap equivalent
bounded_run_tiers.purpose: Validate Bplus emission, selected-bit consistency, degeneracy accounting, and replayability.

bounded_run_tiers.target_rows: at least 10000000 accepted/legal rows if runtime is reasonable
bounded_run_tiers.purpose: Stress-test the no-mixed-B claim and collect prefix histograms with useful tails; promotion requires source-normalized lift beyond the 60k CPU baseline or data that names Kummer classes.

bounded_run_tiers.target_rows: scale only if the first two tiers show non-geometric prefix behavior or a named recurrence candidate
bounded_run_tiers.purpose: Confirm a promoted recurrence/coupling hypothesis, not to hunt blindly.

report_fields: for each gate j: active_B_groups, plus_groups, minus_groups, mixed_groups, missing_groups
promotion_rules: Zero or explainable mixed B groups at large scale through a meaningful depth.
A held-out all-plus prefix density, sign-word state, or recurrence that improves target/source_draw by at least 1.25x over independent half-loss with margin and beats the 60k CPU baseline.
Or a named Kummer/divisor/recurrence hypothesis that feeds exact CAS extraction of f3(B), f4(B), f5(B), ...
kill_rules: Material mixed B groups appear, so Bplus alone does not determine the selected bits.
Prefix counts remain geometric half-loss after source normalization, matching the 60k CPU baseline, and no recurrence/coupling appears.
Telemetry overhead is high and the emitted data cannot feed Kummer/divisor extraction.
The run reports only bucket lifts without raw source denominators.
do_not_run: visible atom products already killed by the B-line screens
large restart/hunt runs unless a sampler, recurrence, or source law is named
